creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 156023
svn diff to resurrect sysutils/jailutils

A message on the ports@ list mentioned having found source
a current listing for the source files for this port. As I
use quite a few "traditional" Jails, I gave it a look, and
found port is quite handy. So I'd like to resurrect it.

Changes:
Added new MASTER_SITES (2)
Changed WWW

That's it!

Thanks!

--Chris
